case.title: CITY OF NEW ORLEANS v. U S EX REL CHRISTMAS

opinion.h1: CITY OF NEW ORLEANS v. U S EX REL CHRISTMAS, 131 U.S. 220 (1889)
opinion.h2: CITY OF NEW ORLEANS v. UNITED STATES ex rel. CHRISTMAS et al.
opinion.p: The decision just made in the case of City of New Orleans v. Myra Clark Gaines, ante, 745, renders it necessary that the judgment or decree in this case should be reversed, and
it is reversed accordingly, and the cause remanded, with instructions to dismiss the petition.
